measures.name: Selected Year
measures.dax: SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Select Year'[Select Year], 2023 )
measures.description: Year chosen in the Select Year slicer (defaults to 2023).

measures.name: CY Sales
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year]
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( SUM ( 'Orders'[Sales] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Sales for the selected year.

measures.name: PY Sales
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( SUM ( 'Orders'[Sales] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Sales for the prior year.

measures.name: CY Profit
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year]
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( SUM ( 'Orders'[Profit] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Profit for the selected year.

measures.name: PY Profit
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( SUM ( 'Orders'[Profit] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Profit for the prior year.

measures.name: CY Quantity
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year]
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( SUM ( 'Orders'[Quantity] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Quantity for the selected year.

measures.name: PY Quantity
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( SUM ( 'Orders'[Quantity] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Quantity for the prior year.

measures.name: CY Orders
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year]
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Orders'[Order ID] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Distinct order count for the selected year.

measures.name: PY Orders
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Orders'[Order ID] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Distinct order count for the prior year.

measures.name: CY Customers
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year]
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Orders'[Customer ID] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Distinct customer count for the selected year.

measures.name: PY Customers
measures.dax:
VAR y = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
    CALCULATE ( DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Orders'[Customer ID] ), FILTER ( 'Orders', YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = y ) )
measures.description: Distinct customer count for the prior year.

measures.name: CY Sales per Customer
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Sales], [CY Customers] )
measures.description: Selected-year sales divided by selected-year customers.

measures.name: PY Sales per Customer
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [PY Sales], [PY Customers] )
measures.description: Prior-year sales divided by prior-year customers.

measures.name: % Diff Sales
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Sales] - [PY Sales], [PY Sales] )
measures.description: Year-over-year sales change.

measures.name: % Diff Profit
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Profit] - [PY Profit], [CY Profit] )
measures.description: Year-over-year profit change (over current-year profit, matching the source workbook).

measures.name: % Diff Quantity
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Quantity] - [PY Quantity], [PY Quantity] )
measures.description: Year-over-year quantity change.

measures.name: % Diff Orders
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Orders] - [PY Orders], [PY Orders] )
measures.description: Year-over-year order-count change.

measures.name: % Diff Customers
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Customers] - [PY Customers], [PY Customers] )
measures.description: Year-over-year customer-count change.

measures.name: % Diff Sales per Customers
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Sales per Customer] - [PY Sales per Customer], [PY Sales per Customer] )
measures.description: Year-over-year change in sales per customer.

measures.name: KPI CY Less PY
measures.dax: IF ( [CY Sales] < [PY Sales], UNICHAR ( 11044 ), "" )
measures.description: Shows a filled dot when current-year sales are below prior-year sales.

measures.name: KPI Sales Avg
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Sales]
VAR avgValue = AVERAGEX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Sales] )
RETURN
    IF ( cur > avgValue, "Above", "Below" )
measures.description: Above/Below versus the average current-year sales across the customers in view (Tableau WINDOW_AVG).

measures.name: KPI Profit Avg
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Profit]
VAR avgValue = AVERAGEX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Profit] )
RETURN
    IF ( cur > avgValue, "Above", "Below" )
measures.description: Above/Below versus the average current-year profit across the customers in view (Tableau WINDOW_AVG).

measures.name: Min/Max Sales
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Sales]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Sales] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Sales] )
RETURN
    IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns the value only on the highest or lowest current-year sales row in view (Tableau WINDOW_MAX/MIN).

measures.name: Min/Max Profit
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Profit]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Profit] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Profit] )
RETURN
    IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns the value only on the highest or lowest current-year profit row in view.

measures.name: Min/Max Quantity
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Quantity]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Quantity] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Quantity] )
RETURN
    IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns the value only on the highest or lowest current-year quantity row in view.

measures.name: Min/Max Orders
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Orders]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Orders] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Orders] )
RETURN
    IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns the value only on the highest or lowest current-year order-count row in view.

measures.name: Min/Max Customers
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Customers]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Customers] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Customers] )
RETURN
    IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns the value only on the highest or lowest current-year customer-count row in view.

measures.name: Min/Max Sales Per Customers
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Sales per Customer]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Sales per Customer] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Customers'[Customer ID] ), [CY Sales per Customer] )
RETURN
    IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns the value only on the highest or lowest current-year sales-per-customer row in view.

measures.name: Nr of Orders per Customers
measures.dax: DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Orders'[Order ID] )
measures.description: Distinct order count in the current filter context (Tableau FIXED [Customer]: COUNTD([Order])).
